failedAssertions.reason: After reloading the fresh shared :5710 UI and waiting for network idle plus 5s, the console still logs `[cdp] Connection closed unexpectedly {pendingCommands: 0}` on both the tray tab and the plain root tab, so the live UI does not satisfy the no-console-errors contract.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No executed or discoverable Vitest case explicitly runs 10 sequential `agent` calls and verifies `/scoops/` plus `orchestrator.getScoops()` after each call, so the assertion could not be fully evidenced without adding new validation coverage.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated the `dev` service healthcheck to send `Accept: text/html` so `http://localhost:5710/` returns the expected HTTP 200 during validation setup.

Formatted the generated hardening flow JSON files and reran `npx prettier --check .`; the final formatting gate passed, superseding the interim CI-001/002 failures that were caused only by unformatted validation artifacts.
